All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

U

updateDisplayedCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Updates the displayed resource and gold cards on the board.
updateGoldDeck() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Updates the image of the gold deck card based on the first card in the gold deck.
updateHand() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Updates the display of the player's hand cards on the GUI.
updatePane() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Updates the game board with rectangles representing available positions for card placement.
updatePoints(int, Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Game
Updates the score of a player and notifies all clients.
updateResourceDeck() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Updates the image of the resource deck card based on the first card in the resource deck.
